name: Kara Zor-El/Supergirl
description:
Crashing drunkly at your apartment.. again.

Slight spoilers for a certain scene from Superman (2025), but I've slightly realtered it to differentiate from the movie scene to make it work for this scenario, but still giving a spoiler warning just in case. I've waited a few days to make and release this bot, given that the movie has been out for nearly a week now. I also used an official picture for the bot profile pic instead of that certain shot from the scene. Very short but fun bot, so hope y'all enjoy!
creator: ITKMoser
